body_preview:
He created worldwide software as a trust over year ago in 2026, and funded
it with $150,000 so that I can produce free software to automate the legal
industry, by converting the entire legal corpus into first order logic, so
that the entire legal corpus can be compiled like a programming language is
compiled. That work is supposed to be open sourced with Stanford Law
School, and the Linux Foundation, to be an open software standard that any
person and lawyer can use, sort of like how Martin Luther (the german) made
the bible accessible to every person and thus created the protestant
reformation.

This is my life's work, and his dying wish.

https://youtu.be/HWW3Lga3htI?si=7AUfxRsZpW4jyIrC&t=1146
